summary: 2026-06-10 11:04:50 PDT — Reviewed `git diff main...HEAD`, `git log --oneline main..HEAD`, and `reviews/session-restart-controls.md`. The changes match the approved spec: the ended-state controls are exposed as required, idle/running/paused behavior is preserved, scope is contained to the allowed files, and the requested backlog bookkeeping is present. I attempted `npm test`, but it could not start in this read-only sandbox because Vite tried to write `client/node_modules/.vite-temp/...`; this is an environment limitation, not a branch finding.
